rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code§11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Elec. Code §273.081, which governs injunctive relief for election code violations. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A person who is being harmed or is in danger of being harmed by a violation or threatened violation of this code is entitled to appropriate injunctive relief to prevent the violation from continuing or occurring.
_note: Rule text concerns election code injunctive relief; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
